technical.body: DeepSeek-V4-Pro (1.6T MoE / 49B active) and DeepSeek-V4-Flash (284B / 13B active) drop together. Native 1M-token context. The Hybrid Attention Architecture cuts inference FLOPs at 1M context to — 27% — of V3.2, and KV cache to — 10%**. Open weights on Hugging Face; APIs at Pro $0.145/$3.48 per M tokens (cache hit / output). Simon Willison calls it "frontier-adjacent at fraction of the price."******

Rolled out simultaneously to ChatGPT Plus / Pro / Business / Enterprise and Codex. SWE-bench — 88.7% — , MMLU 92.4%. Hallucinations cut — -60%** vs GPT-5.4. Runs on NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 racks; API priced 2x GPT-5.4 but framed as "smarter, more token-efficient."******

technical.lead: Intel Q1 2026 earnings: adj EPS $0.29 / revenue $13.58B blowout, +20% (Apr 23)
technical.body: Beats analyst estimates of EPS $0.01 / $12.42B handily on both lines. Non-GAAP gross margin 41%, +650 bps above the high end of guidance. Data Center revenue — $5.1B (+22% YoY) — ; AI-related business at — 60%** of total revenue, +40% YoY. Six straight quarters of guidance beats. The Intel 18A process ramp is the main driver.******

technical.lead: Anthropic publishes a Claude Code quality post-mortem and resets usage caps (Apr 23-24)
technical.body: — Concludes that three changes compounded to drag down Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6: reasoning effort default flipped from "high" to "medium" on 3/4, an idle-time thinking-clear bug introduced 3/26 firing every turn, and a verbosity-reduction system prompt added 4/16. All three reverted by 4/7 / 4/20, fixed in v2.1.116, and on 4/23 usage caps reset across all subscriptions.

citations.label: Anthropic - An update on recent Claude Code quality reports

technical.lead: Siemens + Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha hits 8 hours of autonomous logistics on the Erlangen factory floor (Apr 23)
technical.body: NVIDIA Physical AI stack + KinetIQ framework + Siemens Xcelerator (digital twin / fleet management / industrial comms) integrated. — 60 totes/hour — , — 8+ hours running**, pick-and-place success rate **above 90%**. Not a demo — wired directly into the production manufacturing system.******

citations.label: Siemens Press - Siemens and Humanoid bring Physical AI to the factory floor
